message:
test(unit): expand inline tests for events, replay (+60) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

events: +31 tests — UserVarPayload Debug/Clone/serde, UserVarError Display
  all 3 variants + std::error::Error, Event type_name/pane_id all 9 variants,
  Event serde (SegmentCaptured, WorkflowCompleted with reason),
  MetricsSnapshot/EventBusStats Debug/Clone/serde, EventBusMetrics new==default
  + snapshot reflects increments, RecvError Display/Clone/std::error::Error,
  DedupeVerdict/CooldownVerdict eq variants, EventDeduplicator
  debug/clone/independence/clear, NotificationCooldown debug/clone/clear,
  EventFilter debug_clone, severity_level ordering, parse_severity/
  parse_agent_type case-insensitive, match_rule_glob exact/star/question

replay: +29 tests — PlayerState Debug/Clone/Copy/eq all 4 variants/serde,
  PlaybackPosition Debug/Clone/Copy, PlaybackSpeed const values/default/
  new error/new ok, PlayerControl Debug/Copy/eq, DecodedFrame all 5 variants,
  ExportFormat eq, ExportOptions default/clone independence, RecordingInfo
  debug/clone/serialize, Recording debug/clone, CollectorSink default/
  collects_all, HeadlessSink discards_all, parse_duration_ms edges
  (zero/decimal/unknown unit/whitespace), html_escape edges,
  find_terminal_size zero dims skipped

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
